# Pull Request Checklist

This PR adheres to the enforced Copilot rules for Ionic Vue development:

- [ ] Code follows `.github/copilot-instructions.md` (architecture, i18n, a11y, testing, styling, docs)
- [ ] Lint (`npm run lint`) passes
- [ ] Prettier (`npm run format`) passes
- [ ] Unit tests (`npm run test:unit`) pass
- [ ] Render tests (`npm run test:render`) pass
- [ ] E2E tests (`npm run test:e2e`) pass
- [ ] Performance tests (`npm run test:perf`) pass (if applicable)
- [ ] All new/changed user-facing strings are translated in `en.json` and `es.json`
- [ ] All interactive controls have accessible names/labels
- [ ] All icons used are registered via `addIcons()`
- [ ] PR references parity matrix and original repo feature/behavior
- [ ] Documentation updated as needed

## Parity Matrix Reference

- Feature(s) covered:
- Parity matrix row(s):
- Original repo reference(s):
